body.title: CLOSED: Create palace table + seed shared/project nodes
body.result: adc.palace table + 4 GIN indexes + 11 seed nodes incl. goals tree pointer; 13 tests; 36e454d
body.description:
Create the palace Postgres table and GIN indexes in the ADC rack database, then seed the initial node set.

**Affected files:** new migration script (devices/palace/migrate.py or scripts/palace_bootstrap.py), new seeder script, docs/palace_schema.md (reference)
**Design rules:** no-sqlite, postgres-or-flat-file, palace DB always (D-palace-session-memory-2026-05-07)
**Scope boundary:** IN: table creation, palace.shared.* nodes (akien, rules, capabilities, audits), palace.projects.agent_datacenter.* (summary/map/standards), palace.projects.theigors pointer node. OUT: palace.decisions.* seeding (separate ticket), session/transcript writers (separate tickets), context-load redesign (separate ticket).
**Test plan:** migration script runs clean on fresh DB; seeded nodes queryable by path and by tag filter; GIN index present; rollback script exists.
